CustomField.label: Dose Number
CustomField.description: Which dose in the course this appointment represents (e.g. 1 for first dose, 2 for second), paired with VS_Service__c.VS_Dose_Count__c to show progress through a multi-dose vaccination course. Reserved as the enabling seam for the deferred next-dose recall feature (design §2.3); not consumed by any F-001 automation in this ticket -- set by the booking flow/service that creates the appointment.
